postgres-dev.description: Read-only Postgres MCP pointing at the local dev cluster (Unix socket /tmp, trust auth, database 'postgres'). Use for SELECT-only exploration: schema introspection, sampling rows, EXPLAIN-style queries. For anything that mutates state or needs psql meta-commands (\d, \timing, \watch, COPY, transactions, gdb-friendly client_min_messages), use the psql skill instead — psql is more capable and supports the full DDL/DML surface.
